name: Macaroni Supper Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Gradually add macaroni and 2 teaspoons salt to rapidly boiling water so the water continues to boil.
2. Cook, uncovered, stirring occasionally, until tender; drain in a colander.
3. Heat oil in a large saucepan.
4. Add onions and garlic; saute over medium heat, stirring constantly, until onions are almost tender, about 3 minutes.
5. Stir in undrained tomatoes; break up tomatoes with a spoon.
6. Stir in sugar, tomato paste, and 1/2 teaspoon salt.
7. Beat eggs in a bowl until light; stir in cottage cheese, spinach, half the Cheddar cheese, sage, and 1/2 teaspoon salt. Mix well.
8. In an ungreased 13x9-inch baking dish, arrange layers: one-third of the tomato sauce, half the macaroni, one-third the Cheddar cheese, and half the spinach mixture.
9. Repeat layering; spread the remaining sauce on the spinach layer and sprinkle the remaining cheese around the edges of the casserole.
10. Cover with foil and bake in a preheated 400°F oven for 25 minutes.
11. Remove foil and bake an additional 5 minutes, or until the mixture is hot and bubbly and the cheese is melted.
